changelog: URGENT FIX for v1.44.62/63 regression: full-screen channels were caught in an infinite reconnect loop. The stall watchdog was firing during normal initial buffering (4-8 s on busy live feeds), the new full-source-rebuild restarted buffering, and we looped forever. Now the watchdog only counts buffering as a stall AFTER the player has reached STATE_READY at least once. Initial channel-load buffering is no longer treated as a stall.
STATE_ENDED / STATE_IDLE handlers are likewise gated on hasBeenReady — our own recovery's clearMediaItems() / stop() transient state no longer re-triggers recovery.
Mini-preview was always unaffected (it doesn't use this watchdog).
